content:
- Executed task `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05c-task-zero-panic-unwrap-expect-across-runtime-and-tests.md` from TO BE VERIFIED to NOW EXECUTE.
- Performed deep skeptical verification sweep (high-parallel rg checks across checklist files) and altered the plan: added strict all-targets clippy guard, acceptance grep evidence step, and stale-artifact recovery path.
- Implemented enforcement changes: `src/lib.rs` deny policy now always active (no `cfg(test)` bypass); `Makefile` lint now includes strict `--lib`, `--tests`, and strict `--all-targets` passes.
- Captured evidence in `.ralph/evidence/05c-zero-panic/` before/after scans and gate logs.
- First gate run failed during `make test` with stale archive/missing `*.rcgu.o`; followed plan by running `cargo clean` once and reran full sequence successfully.
- All required gates passed after recovery: `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`.
- Updated task file status/checklists to done/passes/passing true, added a new cross-app learning to `AGENTS.md`, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`.
- Next step after this context: commit all changes with required message format and hand off completion summary.

- Read progress log and fully reviewed .ralph/current_tasks.md.
- Applied bug-first rule: all bug tasks in summary are passing true, so no bug selected.
- Applied priority selection among remaining <passes>false</passes> tasks: chose highest-priority unblocked task in rust-system-harness chain, 10a (high).
- Wrote selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped per instruction.

- Opened the active task pointer from .ralph/current_task.txt and read task 10a (`.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/10a-task-enforce-real-binary-tests-and-ci-prereqs.md`).
- Ran broad parallel exploration across harness + pginfo + process + makefile + task/docs references to map current binary enforcement behavior.
- Confirmed current helper (`src/test_harness/binaries.rs`) is fail-fast only, with real-binary tests in `pg16.rs`, `etcd3.rs`, `pginfo/worker.rs`, `process/worker.rs` using direct `?` propagation, and extra fallout caller in `dcs/etcd_store.rs`.
- Confirmed local binaries currently exist under `.tools/postgres16/bin/*` and `.tools/etcd/bin/etcd`, but policy task still requires centralized optional-vs-enforced gate.
- Wrote a detailed phase-1 implementation plan directly into task 10a and added required terminal marker `TO BE VERIFIED`.
- Next step (next turn): perform deep skeptical verification of the written plan, change at least one plan item, then flip marker to `NOW EXECUTE` before implementation.
